result:
I’d make **basic well-being guaranteed for everyone**—food, clean water, healthcare, safe shelter, and education.

A lot of the world’s biggest problems (conflict, crime, instability, preventable disease, lost potential) get worse when people are forced to survive instead of able to grow. If everyone had a secure foundation, people could contribute more, communities would be more resilient, and progress in almost every other area would accelerate.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
